findings.title: NFT receiver-hook reentrancy (safeMint/safeTransfer callback)
findings.note: ERC721/1155 safeMint/safeTransfer triggers the recipient's onERCxxxReceived hook THEN a state write follows (CEI), no nonReentrant -> receiver-hook reentrancy (re-mint past supply cap / double-claim / skip per-addr limit). #1 NFT-game bug.
